name: getFileContent
description:
Read the text content of a previously saved file. Supports two addressing modes:

1. By filename (preferred for known paths): provide the relative filename used when saving with getFile, e.g. 'dm-notebook/campaign.md'. The file is read directly from the user's file store without needing a URL.
2. By URL: provide the absolute http/https URL returned by a previous getFile call.

Use filename when you know the path (e.g. a persistent notebook). Use url when you only have the URL from a prior tool result.

Binary files (images, PDFs, ZIPs, audio, video) are rejected. Maximum file size: 512 KB.

filename.description: Relative file path within the user's file store, e.g. 'dm-notebook/campaign.md' or 'notes/session1.md'. Use this when you know the filename. Takes precedence over url if both are provided.

url.description: Absolute http/https URL of the file to read, as returned by getFile. Use this when you only have the URL and not the original filename.
